name: handoff_unknown_feature_to_external_llm
entry_point: context_engine/main.py prompt_only path when Ollama is unavailable
steps: context_engine/discovery.py discover_feature_from_codebase builds a compact snapshot
context_engine/ollama_fallback.py build_manual_fallback_prompt creates a short GPT or Claude handoff prompt
context_engine/main.py prints the handoff prompt to console
